creator: baileygeoff@telus.net
text:
If one is not intimately familiar with the various abbreviations for
the audio codecs, drivers and visualization plugins then it is difficult
to decide which options are necessary.

Fix: 

I have attached a patch to the Makefile for your consideration, which
attempts to offer better option descriptions.
How-To-Repeat: I usually try to keep the installation as small as possible on my older
model computer.  For example, since the 'neon' plugin was marked as 
experimental I used to un-check it, not realizing that it was required 
for http transport.
